Careers at Kanata GymnoSphere
Kanata Gymnosphere is Recruiting a Gymnastics Coach

Kanata GymnoSphere is hiring Gymnastics Coach. Kanata GymnoSphere is the most successful and large gymnastics facility in Kanata, Ottawa (17,000 sq. ft).

Position Title: Gymnastics Coach

Type of position: Full time (30 hours/week)

Place of employment: Unit 7 - 430 Hazeldean, Road, Ottawa, Ontario, K2L 1T9

Work Location: in person

Immediate supervisor: Management Team

Start date: As soon as possible

Vacancies: 2 positions

Salary: 36.00/hourly 

Benefits: Medical insurance, Vacation 3 weeks per year, Paid certifications, On-site parking

We offer an extensive Recreational and diverse (low to high level) Competitive Program.

Our programs are growing, and we are currently seeking a versatile Gymnastics Coach.

For more information about our club, you may visitwww.kanatagymnastics.ca

Skills Requirements

- Minimum of 4 years of experience as a gymnastics coach

- Motivated, engaged, enthusiastic, friendly, positive, team player, follows instructions.

- Excellent capacity to plan for and manage a training group

- Assists athletes in reaching goals

- Plan and train both recreational and competitive gymnastics
